title: URGENT: Purchasing and Project Admin (Construction, Engineering)
description:
• Plan, manage, and monitor the procurement process for all projects in line with company policies.

  • Source and purchase materials with a focus on cost efficiency, quality, timely delivery, and compliance.

  • Compare suppliers and materials based on cost, quality, durability, and environmental considerations.

  • Prepare and issue purchase orders and related documents accurately and on time.

  • Prepare procurement and purchasing reports for project teams and management.

  • Work closely with logistics, customer service, service providers, and internal teams to ensure smooth delivery and receipt of goods.

  • Coordinate with managers, quantity surveyors, and other stakeholders to support project execution.

  • Prepare, organise, and maintain project documents such as contracts, purchase orders, invoices, and reports.

  • Schedule and support project meetings, including preparing agendas and recording minutes.

  • Track project progress to ensure milestones, deadlines, and deliverables are met.

  • Handle document submissions and follow up with relevant parties for timely responses.

  • Act as a point of contact between project managers, internal teams, clients, vendors, and subcontractors.

  • Liaise with suppliers and subcontractors to ensure on-time delivery of materials and proper documentation.

  • Assist with project-related financial administration, including invoice processing, payment tracking, and expense records.

  • Verify invoices against purchase orders and delivery orders.

Requirements:

  • Diploma in any related fields.

  • Minimum 2 years of procurement experience in Construction Industry

  • Strong understanding of procurement processes, including sourcing, negotiation, and supplier management.

Interested applicants for the above advertised position(s), please kindly email an updated copy of your resume to: gs1@talenttradersg.com

EA License No.: 13C6305

Registration No.: R1985956 (VIVIEN TAN)

For candidate who applied for the advertised position is deemed to have consented to us that we may collect, use or disclose your personal information for purpose in connection with the services provided by us.

postedCompany.description:
TALENT TRADER GROUP PTE. LTD.

Talent Trader is steered by young, dynamic professionals; each of them bringing their own vast experiences from leading Banks and HR Agencies.


We provide efficient talent sourcing, recruitment and retention services that help companies acquire effective Mid-management talent.


We offer the following value-added services for a variety of Mid-management positions across industry veticals such as Banking, Marine, Offshore, Retail, IT, F&B, Education, Manufacturing and Others:


- Talent Sourcing and Recruitment

- International Recruitment

- Contract & Temporary Staffing

- Payroll Services

- Employment Passes
